name: should create a query with prospect columns, weighted opportunity, and opportunity share
description: Test case for should create a query with prospect columns, weighted opportunity, and opportunity share
expected_query: with "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid) as pid, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 <= 20 AND bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1.30 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 <= 20 AND trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 2.25 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 > 20 AND bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 0.48 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 > 20 AND trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1.43 ELSE 0 END), 2) as weighted_opportunity_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid)), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2026]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "tbd1ac72206b501252204a9f90ea4ba57" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", ROUND(100.0 * (COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.bc_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) + COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END)) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.bc_pid IS NOT NULL OR nfl_plays.trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) as opportunity_share_from_plays from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."nfl_team" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("bc_pid" is not null or "trg_pid" is not null) group by "pg"."pid") select "player"."pid", "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."weighted_opportunity_from_plays" AS "weighted_opportunity_from_plays_0", "tbd1ac72206b501252204a9f90ea4ba57"."opportunity_share_from_plays" AS "opportunity_share_from_plays_0", CASE WHEN player.height_inches > 0 THEN ROUND(CAST((player.weight_pounds::float / NULLIF(player.height_inches::float * player.height_inches::float, 0)) * 703 AS NUMERIC), 2) ELSE NULL END as bmi_0, CASE WHEN player.forty_yard_dash_seconds > 0 THEN ROUND((player.weight_pounds * 200.0) / NULLIF(POWER(player.forty_yard_dash_seconds, 4), 0), 2) ELSE NULL END as speed_score_0, CASE WHEN player.primary_position IN ('WR', 'TE') AND player.forty_yard_dash_seconds > 0 THEN ROUND(((player.weight_pounds * 200.0) / NULLIF(POWER(player.forty_yard_dash_seconds, 4), 0)) * (player.height_inches / CASE WHEN player.primary_position = 'TE' THEN 76.4 ELSE 73.0 END), 2) ELSE NULL END as height_adjusted_speed_score_0, ROUND(COALESCE(player.shuttle_run_seconds, 0) + COALESCE(player.three_cone_drill_seconds, 0), 2) as agility_score_0, ROUND(COALESCE(player.vertical_jump_inches, 0) + (COALESCE(player.broad_jump_inches, 0) / 12.0), 2) as burst_score_0, "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288" on "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "tbd1ac72206b501252204a9f90ea4ba57" on "tbd1ac72206b501252204a9f90ea4ba57"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."weighted_opportunity_from_plays", "tbd1ac72206b501252204a9f90ea4ba57"."opportunity_share_from_plays", player.weight_pounds, player.height_inches, player.weight_pounds, player.forty_yard_dash_seconds, player.weight_pounds, player.forty_yard_dash_seconds, player.height_inches, player.primary_position, player.shuttle_run_seconds, player.three_cone_drill_seconds, player.vertical_jump_inches, player.broad_jump_inches, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
